title: Mickey Joe's Zombies
description:
This pack adds 200 million possible variants for zombies, with references to player skins in the entire Minecraft Multiverse.
It mixes random heads, facial expressions, shirts, jeans, and two layers of random tears to achieve this level of immersion.
body:
Disclaimer: You will need to install OptiFine to take full advantage of this pack's features. That is all.

[Here's a list of mods](https://fabricmc.net/wiki/optifine-alternatives) that can replace some of OptiFine's features. So you can play with Barely Default's cool details without OptiFine

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/e-09ofC8Tn8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Mickey Joe's Zombies adds 200 MILLION-ish random zombie skins to your game!
I would say "nuff said" if it wasn't so cheesy. You get the point.
[This video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e-09ofC8Tn8&list=PLO6GPyTLxi6tpgNiGLoKuTFc-dggL3w-O&index=1) explains it all 👍
___

**Get your own zombie added to the pack!**

The Zombie Tier on [my Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/MushirMickeyJoe/membership) lets you add your skin to my pack! ...on a few conditions:
1. You must have made the skin yourself!! Or have permission from artist who made it :)
2. Don't break Mojang's rules for skins :)
3. I'll try to fit in as much of your provided skin as possible, and will need to zombify it in the Barely Default style

Current contributors to Mickey Joe's Zombies:
- Stridey
- GoesBySully
- VaderMan24
- Ewan Howell
- GillsBills
- EskiMojo
- FreshLX
- DarthCat25
- StitchSprites
___

Check out my socials!

💲 Get your skin added as a zombie - Patreon.com/MushirMickeyJoe
🦜 the latest - Twitter.com/MushirMickeyJoe
📷 the Gram - Instagram.com/MushirMickeyJoe

Thanks for playing!

Special shoutout to [Ewan Howell](https://ewanhowell.com/) who is always down to help me when Barely Default features don't work <3

And if you're still reading this, please check out my YouTube channel where I commit to an episode of my show MJ Trips every week for the rest of my life - [YouTube.com/@MushirMickeyJoe](https://www.youtube.com/@MushirMickeyJoe)
